body.title: SystemProxy facade — single object for all local system metrics
body.result: 591ae79c — SystemProxy: cpu_percent, memory, disk, process, snapshot, is_under_pressure, report_str. Cached + thread-safe + IgorBase. Module singleton. 15 tests.
body.description: Create SystemProxy class that owns CPU, memory, disk, GPU, network health, inference availability for the local box. Replaces scattered psutil calls in push_sources.py, inference_gateway.py, filesystem.py, training_corpus.py. Cached readings with configurable staleness. Thread-safe. IgorBase mixin.
